summary: SEC-7.1 paragraph 4 (rim circumnavigation) — two moderate holes addressed. (1) The v22 quote "Southern arc distances 2x too long — FAILS. Globe wins cross-equator." is a real concession from raw-text/06-evolution.txt line 56, but it is scoped to 2× coordinate-formula errors on cross-equatorial city pairs under V9/V11 circular disc + WGS84 — NOT to the 8-9× rim circumnavigation problem. EXP-126 framed it as acknowledging "the fundamental geometric problem," which over-loads the quote. The replacement prose explicitly scopes what v22 conceded and distinguishes it from the rim problem. (2) The AE projection derivation r = 20,015 × 160/180 ≈ 17,791 km is now shown inline with a note that V12/V13 use non-linear H(r) and elliptic-integral mappings, but that rim circumference is projection-independent because the disc radius sets the scale. Bonus: the Finsler-metric defense flagged in EXP-126 anticipated_objections but not deployed in-prose is now pre-empted. Surgical patch — paragraph 4 only, find/replace via find_target → replacement_html. TLDR unchanged (already accurate). Citation cleanup (Soviet Ob / HMS Endurance / yacht races at 70°S — curmudgeon major hole #1) is OUT OF SCOPE per EXP-161 notes and flagged for a possible future EXP.
